title: Benders decomposition for planning at scale
prompt: A decomposition method solves a large facility-and-flow planning model by separating binary location decisions from continuous flow subproblems. Its contribution is computational scalability on the same mathematical model. Frame why that matters to planners without inventing real-time operation or new decisions.

model_specification.model_type: Benders decomposition for capacitated facility location
model_specification.mechanism: Master decisions induce separable flow subproblems whose cuts refine the master lower bound.

fidelity_requirements: Algorithm does not change the business objective
Planning is offline, not real time

evidence_needs.claim: The method scales to larger instances
